records.question: Who are the players that died in Kalamazoo, MI?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
JOIN college ON player_college.college_id = college.college_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player_id
FROM player
WHERE death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND death_state = 'MI'

records.question: Which players named Pete who debuted on 1936-06-13 have a height of exactly 75?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.height = 75 AND player.name_first = 'Pete' AND player.debut = '1936-06-13'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player_id
FROM player
WHERE name_first = 'Pete'
AND debut = '1936-06-13'
AND height = 75

records.question: Which players who have recorded all_star appearances and player_award records were born in 1960, died in Poway, USA, throw left-handed, weigh exactly 185, and have a player_award note of 'OF' in the year 1990?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Poway' AND player_award.notes = 'OF' AND player.throws = 'L' AND player.death_country = 'USA' AND player.weight = 185 AND player.birth_year = 1960 AND player_award.year = 1990
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
JOIN all_star a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
JOIN player_award pa ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE p.birth_year = 1960
AND p.death_city = 'Poway'
AND p.death_country = 'USA'
AND p.throws = 'L'
AND p.weight = 185
AND pa.notes = 'OF'
AND pa.year = 1990

records.question: What players born in Pensacola debuted on 2010-04-30, are 72 inches tall, bat and throw right-handed, have a birth month at most 12, and have exactly one all-star game played with game number 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
WHERE player.birth_city = 'Pensacola' AND all_star.game_num = 0 AND player.debut = '2010-04-30' AND player.birth_month <= 12 AND all_star.gp = 1 AND player.bats = 'R' AND player.throws = 'R' AND player.height = 72
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
JOIN all_star a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
WHERE p.birth_city = 'Pensacola'
  AND p.debut = '2010-04-30'
  AND p.height = 72
  AND p.bats = 'R'
  AND p.throws = 'R'
  AND p.birth_month <= 12
  AND a.game_num = 0
  AND a.gp = 1

records.question: Which players died in Salisbury on the 18th day of the month or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.death_city = 'Salisbury' AND player.death_day >= 18
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player_id
FROM player
WHERE death_city = 'Salisbury' AND death_day >= 18

JOIN all_star a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
JOIN manager_award ma ON p.player_id = ma.player_id

records.question: Who are the players named Curt from Anchorage who debuted on 1988-09-07, are at most 77 inches tall, born in 1966 or later, and have both all-star appearances and player awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.name_first = 'Curt' AND player.height <= 77 AND player.birth_city = 'Anchorage' AND player.birth_year >= 1966 AND player.debut = '1988-09-07'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
INNER JOIN all_star a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
INNER JOIN player_award pa ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE p.name_first = 'Curt'
AND p.birth_city = 'Anchorage'
AND p.debut = '1988-09-07'
AND p.height <= 77
AND p.birth_year >= 1966

records.question: Which players named Buck Rodgers, born in Delaware on the 16th or earlier day of the month, weigh at least 190 pounds and have received a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.birth_day <= 16 AND player.name_last = 'Rodgers' AND player.birth_city = 'Delaware' AND player.weight >= 190 AND player.name_first = 'Buck'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
JOIN manager_award ma ON p.player_id = ma.player_id
WHERE p.name_first = 'Buck'
AND p.name_last = 'Rodgers'
AND p.birth_state = 'DE'
AND p.birth_day <= 16
AND p.weight >= 190

records.question: Which players named Gerald Arthur, born in Sacramento, CA, USA in August, who bat left-handed, weigh at most 185 pounds, and played their final game on or after July 8, 1993?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.final_game >= '1993-07-08' AND player.name_given = 'Gerald Arthur' AND player.birth_state = 'CA' AND player.birth_city = 'Sacramento' AND player.birth_country = 'USA' AND player.bats = 'L' AND player.birth_month = 8 AND player.weight <= 185
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player_id
FROM player
WHERE name_first = 'Gerald' 
  AND name_last = 'Arthur'
  AND birth_city = 'Sacramento'
  AND birth_state = 'CA'
  AND birth_country = 'USA'
  AND birth_month = 8
  AND bats = 'L'
  AND weight <= 185
  AND final_game >= '1993-07-08'
